manufacturing_locations: International locations including North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific
dependencies: Some components and sub-assemblies are currently available from only a limited number of suppliers
Most materials and supplies are readily available from numerous sources and suppliers throughout the world
risks: Limited number of suppliers for certain components and sub-assemblies
Changes in the supply of, or price for, raw materials, parts, and components
Changes in exchange rates affecting supply costs
Reliance on third-party cloud computing platforms (Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure)
SaaS offerings increasingly reliant on a limited number of third-party cloud computing platforms

regulatory_risks: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in European Union and United Kingdom
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and amendments
At least 20 U.S. states have passed comprehensive privacy legislation
Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)
Health Information Technology for Economic and Clinical Health Act (HITECH Act)
FDA regulations for medical diagnostic and surgical devices under Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act
U.S. International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR)
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions
Trade restrictions, trade agreements, tariffs (including new, expanded, or retaliatory tariffs)
Environmental protection laws governing air emissions, water discharges, waste management, and workplace safety
Hart-Scott-Rodino Act antitrust regulations in U.S. and similar antitrust regulations in foreign countries
EU AI Act placing new requirements on providers of AI technologies
Income tax laws and regulations in various jurisdictions
Data localization requirements and restrictions on international data transfer

sanction_risks: Risks associated with sales to denied or sanctioned parties
Potential impact from changing U.S. and foreign trade policies
Recent U.S. tariffs imposed or threatened on China, Canada, Mexico, and other countries
Retaliatory actions by foreign countries in response to U.S. tariffs
Economic disruption caused by armed conflicts (war in Ukraine, conflict in Middle East)
